result.stdout:
Description:
  License resource compiler tool

Usage:
  Oleander.LicResComp.Tool [options]

Options:
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  -c, --complist <complist>  Specifies the name of a '*.licenses.txt' file that contains the list of licensed components.
  -t, --target <target>      Specifies the executable for which the .licenses file is being generated.


Oleander.LicResComp.Tool.dll(84,0) : Main message LRC0 : LicResComp 0
